title: Daily Sacred Teachings
subtitle: One line of wisdom, drawn fresh each day
meta_description: A daily teaching from Sri Ramana Maharshi and the saints of Arunachala — short, sourced lines of wisdom to turn the mind inward. Free, no account needed.
body_html:
A new teaching is drawn each day from Bhagavan's words and the wisdom of the saints of Arunachala. Come back any day — no account needed — and let one line turn the mind inward.

Recent teachings

May 9, 2026

The mind is like a river, always flowing outward. True peace is found when the river returns to its source.

April 22, 2026

In every moment, the opportunity for liberation exists; all that is required is to turn inward.

April 11, 2026

Silence is not the absence of sound, but the presence of truth, which needs no words to be understood.

April 4, 2026

True liberation comes not from escaping the world, but from seeing the world as a reflection of the Self.

The full archive grows daily. Older teachings will appear here as the collection is added.
notes: Daily quotes captured via rendered browser; archive to be extended.
